forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 8pm and 9pm. Partly cloudy. Low around 52, with temperatures rising to around 55 overnight. North northeast wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

forecast.name: Thursday Night

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
